nasb.text: Therefore let us be diligent to enter that rest, so that no one will fall, through following the same example of disobedience.

esv.text: Let us therefore strive to enter that rest, so that no one may fall by the same sort of disobedience.

cnv.text: 所以，我們要竭力進入那安息，免得有人隨著那不順從的樣子就跌倒了。

ccb.text: 因此，我们要竭力进入那安息，免得重蹈他们的覆辙，因不顺服而倒毙。

csbs.text: 所以，我们要努力进入那安息，免得有人照着那同样不信从的样式跌落了。
